subject: [PATCH v2 14/28] nfsd: add callback encoding and decoding linkages for CB_NOTIFY

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds routines for encoding and decoding CB_NOTIFY messages in the NFSv4 callback protocol. It introduces new functions to handle the encoding and decoding of these messages, which are generated by the xdrgen tool. The patch also updates the nfsd/nfs4callback.c file to include the new encoding and decoding functions, as well as adds a new procedure for CB_NOTIFY to the rpc_procinfo array. This patch is part of a larger series of changes to improve the NFSv4 callback protocol.
